title: Add Reporting Status Filter to Data Dictionary
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to filter dictionary fields by Reporting Status, so that I can quickly find fields that are actively used in reports.
description: Add a "Reporting Status" dropdown filter to the dictionary page filter section. Users can select a reporting status value to show or hide fields based on their reporting usage status.
acceptance_criteria: Reporting Status dropdown appears in the dictionary filter section
Selecting a status value filters the field list to only matching records
Clearing the filter shows all fields again
ux_changes: New Reporting Status dropdown in the dictionary page filter section.
middleware_changes: Filter query logic to support reporting status filtering.
implementation_notes: Uses the same reporting status values already available in the field detail dropdown.
comment_summary: Waqar confirmed the requirement and implemented the filter. Shared a screenshot of the new dropdown in the filter section.
